title: claude-dotfiles — Shared Configuration
description: Portable settings that live in your private config repo. Defines canonical variable names and preferences. Safe to commit — contains no paths or secrets.

variables.description: Canonical variable names and what they represent. Keys match keys in machine.json knowledge_dirs and project_dirs (lowercase). Values are human-readable descriptions — not paths. Use this as the master list of what variables SHOULD exist across all machines.

project_dirs.description: Canonical list of named project directory keys that should exist across all machines. Each key should appear in machine.json project_dirs on machines where it is available.

knowledge_dirs.description: Canonical list of named knowledge directory keys that should exist across all machines. Each key should appear in machine.json knowledge_dirs on machines where it is available.

commands_enabled.description: Which commands to activate. Names match filenames in commands/ without the .md extension.

preferences.description: Behavioural preferences applied across all Claude sessions.

greeting_once_per_day.description: Show the greeting only on the first session of each calendar day.

security_review_on_session_start.description: Run a security review command automatically at the start of every session that does not begin with the full greeting.
